function.name: bootc_switch
function.description: Switch the MiOS host to a new bootc container image reference. Stages the deployment; reboot to activate (or pass apply_now=true).

image_ref.description: Full OCI reference, e.g. ghcr.io/mios-dev/mios:latest or ghcr.io/mios-dev/mios@sha256:...

transport.description: Container transport. 'registry' is the default for GHCR.

apply_now.description: If true, run `bootc upgrade --apply` immediately. Null = stage only.
